category_sources: source_facts.description says Floresta is a lightweight embeddable Bitcoin client; official repository README repeats that positioning.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is floresta; official GitHub repository and project homepage use Floresta.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to docs.getfloresta.sh and the Floresta mdBook for architecture and internals.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Bitcoin client and embeddable design; official README describes standalone validating node and library use.
